untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'intra-bar reversal or tail formation showing rejection of profit-taking' and 'entry on the rebound from same-day profit-taking dip' which cannot be precisely quantified with available indicators. MA slope direction and the composite behavior of wick/body formations were approximated, but the exact emotional/order-flow mechanics cannot be reliably translated to rule-based conditions.
translation_notes: Approximated 'trend confirmed' using price vs sma_20; 'profit-taking volume' using vol_ratio_20 > 1.2 (120%); 'intra-bar rejection' using wick-to-body ratio. Entry on rebound requires intrabar price action data not available in end-of-bar indicators. Stop loss set at 2 ATR equivalent (2.0%). Pivot points used as proxy for swing lows/highs.
